title: GCP Database Tasks — Run directly on Cloud SQL
context: These tasks must be run directly on the Cloud SQL production instance (rdf-postgres) via psql or gcloud sql connect. They complement the code changes already applied locally (DB-002..005, DB-012 view/index changes, DB-003 legacy table removal).

connection.psql_command: PGPASSWORD=$(gcloud secrets versions access latest --secret=cloud-db-password --project=rdf-api-project) psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 15432 -U postgres -d rdf

tasks.title: Set random_page_cost = 1.1 (SSD-correct planner setting)
sql: ALTER DATABASE rdf SET random_page_cost = 1.1;
tasks.verification: SELECT name, setting FROM pg_settings WHERE name = 'random_page_cost';
tasks.note: Takes effect for new connections only. Redeploy Cloud Run or restart batch VM services to pick up.

tasks.title: Validate is_current invariant before deploying view changes
sql: -- Must return 0 rows. If any rows appear, fix duplicates before deploying.
SELECT document_id, COUNT(*) AS c FROM krs_document_versions WHERE is_current = true GROUP BY document_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT krs, COUNT(*) AS c FROM krs_entity_versions WHERE is_current = true GROUP BY krs HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
tasks.note: If either query returns rows, the is_current flag has duplicates that must be resolved first. Run: UPDATE krs_document_versions SET is_current = false WHERE version_id NOT IN (SELECT MAX(version_id) FROM krs_document_versions WHERE is_current = true GROUP BY document_id);

tasks.title: Drop unused indexes (39 MB saved + faster writes)
sql: -- Large unused indexes on entity versioning (39 MB, 0 scans)
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_krs_entity_versions_current;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_krs_entity_versions_valid_from;
-- Old non-partial index on documents (replaced by idx_doc_versions_current_krs in code)
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_krs_doc_versions_krs_current;
-- Old valid_from index (replaced by idx_doc_versions_observed in code)
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_krs_doc_versions_valid_from;
-- Legacy table indexes (will fail harmlessly if tables already dropped)
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_documents_krs;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_documents_not_downloaded;
-- Small unused indexes on prediction tables (0 scans, <100 rows each)
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_features_krs;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_features_year;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_reports_year;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_reports_logical;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_companies_pkd;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_companies_nip;
tasks.rollback: Recreate any needed index with CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY.

tasks.title: Create new partial indexes for current-row lookups
sql: -- Partial index: only ~857K current rows indexed instead of all 1.9M
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_doc_versions_current_krs ON krs_document_versions (krs) WHERE is_current = true;
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_entity_versions_current_krs ON krs_entity_versions (krs) WHERE is_current = true;
-- Covering index for pipeline discovery queries
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_doc_versions_observed ON krs_document_versions (observed_at DESC) WHERE is_current = true;
verification: EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM krs_documents_current WHERE krs = '0000694720';
-- Should show: Index Scan using idx_doc_versions_current_krs
-- Should NOT show: Parallel Seq Scan on krs_document_versions

tasks.title: Drop legacy tables (krs_entities + krs_documents) — 514 MB saved
tasks.depends_on: Code deployed with legacy writes removed. Run for 1 week to verify nothing breaks.
sql: -- BACKUP FIRST!
-- pg_dump -h 127.0.0.1 -p 15432 -U postgres -d rdf -t krs_entities -t krs_documents > /tmp/legacy_backup.sql
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS krs_documents CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS krs_entities CASCADE;

tasks.title: Raise work_mem to 16 MB (or 8 MB for db-f1-micro)
sql: -- For db-g1-small (1.7 GB RAM):
ALTER DATABASE rdf SET work_mem = '16MB';
-- For db-f1-micro (614 MB RAM) — safer option:
-- ALTER DATABASE rdf SET work_mem = '8MB';

tasks.title: Configure pipeline DB (rdf-pipeline) at creation time
tasks.phase: Phase 5 — when pipeline DB is created
sql: ALTER DATABASE pipeline SET random_page_cost = 1.1;
ALTER DATABASE pipeline SET work_mem = '16MB';
tasks.note: Run these immediately after creating the pipeline Cloud SQL instance. Add to docs/PIPELINE_GCP_SETUP.md.

execution_order.note: Can be run right now. GCP-DB-001 fixes planner. GCP-DB-003 drops unused indexes.

execution_order.phase: Phase 2 — Validate + deploy code + create indexes
execution_order.note: First validate is_current invariant (GCP-DB-002). Then deploy the code with simplified views. Then create the new partial indexes (GCP-DB-004). After this, EXPLAIN should show index scans.

execution_order.phase: Phase 3 — Drop legacy tables (1 week after Phase 2)
execution_order.note: Wait 1 week after code deploy to confirm nothing reads legacy tables. Then backup + drop.
Raise work_mem after confirming DB is stable.
Run when the pipeline Cloud SQL instance is created.
